summary: A single test assertion failed in DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion(): the test expected owner version not to increment, but it was incremented when updating a collection.
root_cause: Test assertion failure in DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion(). The test assertion 'owner version not incremented' expected false but got true, indicating the collection owner's version was unexpectedly incremented during the test.

evidence.reason: Shows the specific test that failed

evidence.quote: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: owner version not incremented ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>
evidence.reason: Explicit assertion failure: owner version field was expected to not be incremented (false) but was incremented (true)
Confirms isolated test failure; the vast majority of tests passed

suggested_fix: Investigate whether recent changes to collection versioning logic unintentionally altered behavior so that collection updates now increment the owner's version field when they previously did not, or update the test expectation if this behavior change is intentional
